steps.title: Identify constant rate of change
steps.content: The airplane descends at a constant rate of 400 feet per minute. When a quantity changes by a constant amount over time, it is modeled by a linear function. Exponential functions involve constant percentage change, which is not mentioned here.

steps.title: Determine increasing or decreasing
steps.content: Since the altitude is decreasing over time, the function must be decreasing. Exponential functions require a multiplicative relationship (not applicable here). Linear functions with negative slopes describe constant decreases.

steps.title: Conclusion
steps.content: The scenario involves a constant rate of decrease → linear function with negative slope. That matches choice B — B is correct.
